'''竏噐-ng-g-k''' ('''kayanggekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zareba|zareba]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zareba|zareba]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏噐-ng-g-k
|-
! Lemma
| kayanggekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyangekoko|thiyangekoko]] || [[word:jiyangekoko|jiyangekoko]] || [[word:shiyangekoko|shiyangekoko]] || [[word:kiyangekoko|kiyangekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyangekoko|thuthuyangekoko]] || [[word:jujuyangekoko|jujuyangekoko]] || [[word:shushuyangekoko|shushuyangekoko]] || [[word:kukuyangekoko|kukuyangekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyangekoko|thuyangekoko]] || [[word:juyangekoko|juyangekoko]] || [[word:shuyangekoko|shuyangekoko]] || [[word:kuyangekoko|kuyangekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyangekoko|thuyangekoko]] || [[word:juyangekoko|juyangekoko]] || [[word:shuyangekoko|shuyangekoko]] || [[word:kuyangekoko|kuyangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyangekoko|theyangekoko]] || [[word:jeyangekoko|jeyangekoko]] || [[word:sheyangekoko|sheyangekoko]] || [[word:keyangekoko|keyangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyangekoko|thothoyangekoko]] || [[word:jojoyangekoko|jojoyangekoko]] || [[word:shoshoyangekoko|shoshoyangekoko]] || [[word:kokoyangekoko|kokoyangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyangekoko|thoyangekoko]] || [[word:joyangekoko|joyangekoko]] || [[word:shoyangekoko|shoyangekoko]] || [[word:koyangekoko|koyangekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyangekoko|thoyangekoko]] || [[word:joyangekoko|joyangekoko]] || [[word:shoyangekoko|shoyangekoko]] || [[word:koyangekoko|koyangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦyangekoko|thﾃｦyangekoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦyangekoko|jﾃｦyangekoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦyangekoko|shﾃｦyangekoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦyangekoko|kﾃｦyangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayangekoko|thathayangekoko]] || [[word:jajayangekoko|jajayangekoko]] || [[word:shashayangekoko|shashayangekoko]] || [[word:kakayangekoko|kakayangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayangekoko|thayangekoko]] || [[word:jayangekoko|jayangekoko]] || [[word:shayangekoko|shayangekoko]] || [[word:kayangekoko|kayangekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayangekoko|thayangekoko]] || [[word:jayangekoko|jayangekoko]] || [[word:shayangekoko|shayangekoko]] || [[word:kayangekoko|kayangekoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
